title: Community Moderation Update (2026-04-29)
body: We've removed two accounts (spam_wave_42, toxic_runner) for mass phishing spam and repeated targeted harassment. A small number of users received warnings for minor rule violations (suspicious automation, off-topic posting). As a reminder, please review our community guidelines and report any suspicious activity to the moderation team. Thank you for helping keep our community safe and welcoming for everyone!
